<!-- @generated by scripts/build-tokens.mjs from packages/tokens/src/tokens.ts. Do not edit manually. -->
# Tokens

Sanchika v0.1 tokens are authored once in `packages/tokens/src/tokens.ts`. `pnpm build:tokens` deterministically generates package CSS, TypeScript metadata, and this reference. `pnpm check:tokens` fails when any generated output is stale.

The C1 direction is approved, but visual maturity is not complete. Token extraction improves consistency and expressive vocabulary; it does not close the five reservations around brand memorability, emotional impact, product-specific character, real workflow depth, or edge-state completeness.

## Architecture and usage

- Import `@sanchika/tokens/theme.css` before `@sanchika/primitives/styles.css`.
- Use semantic roles; do not copy resolved values into consumers.
- OKLCH remains the color source of truth. There is one canonical light theme; dark and high-contrast themes are not part of S3.
- Font stacks are runtime-safe fallbacks. Font binaries and loading are consumer/gallery responsibilities.
- Generated TypeScript exports `tokenDefinitions`, `tokenGroupDefinitions`, `getTokenDefinition`, and the v0.0.2 compatibility collections.

Standards: [CSS Custom Properties](https://www.w3.org/TR/css-variables-1/) and [W3C Design Tokens Community Group](https://www.w3.org/community/design-tokens/). Sanchika does not claim conformance to an unfinished exchange format.

## Color and surfaces

Cool-mineral planes, ledger ink, action roles, and semantic status triads.

| Semantic token | CSS variable | Example / resolved value | Use | Do not use | Legacy alias / deprecation | C1 or compatibility source |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `color.canvas` | `--sk-color-canvas` | `oklch(97% 0.008 220)` | Primary page background for light Sanchika surfaces. | Do not use as a product-specific campaign color. | --sk-color-bg-base: Deprecated background-base name; use canvas. | C1 foundation.css shared across ComplyEaze, Axal, Pack, and Tools |
| `color.surface` | `--sk-color-surface` | `oklch(99.2% 0.003 220)` | Default panels, records, and grouped content. | Do not imply elevation when a border is sufficient. | --sk-color-bg-surface: Deprecated background-surface name; use surface. | C1 foundation.css shared across ComplyEaze, Axal, Pack, and Tools |
| `color.surface-raised` | `--sk-color-surface-raised` | `oklch(100% 0 0)` | Controls and genuinely raised content planes. | Do not turn every section into a raised card. | — | C1 foundation.css shared across ComplyEaze, Axal, Pack, and Tools |
| `color.surface-inset` | `--sk-color-surface-inset` | `oklch(95% 0.012 225)` | Queues, wells, and contained secondary regions. | Do not use as a separate product palette. | — | C1 Axal workspace canvas |
| `color.surface-muted` | `--sk-color-surface-muted` | `alias of color.surface-inset; resolves to oklch(95% 0.012 225)` | Low-emphasis supporting regions and neutral status backgrounds. | Do not use when the content needs a stronger boundary. | — | C1 Axal workspace canvas reused semantically |
| `color.ink-primary` | `--sk-color-ink-primary` | `oklch(19% 0.028 245)` | Primary text, headings, and dense data. | Do not soften primary operational facts. | — | C1 foundation.css shared across ComplyEaze, Axal, Pack, and Tools |
| `color.ink-secondary` | `--sk-color-ink-secondary` | `oklch(43% 0.024 245)` | Supporting text that must still pass normal-text contrast. | Do not use for disabled content by opacity alone. | — | C1 foundation.css shared across ComplyEaze, Axal, Pack, and Tools |
| `color.ink-muted` | `--sk-color-ink-muted` | `alias of color.ink-secondary; resolves to oklch(43% 0.024 245)` | Hints, metadata, and secondary descriptions. | Do not use for critical status or primary instructions. | — | C1 foundation.css shared across ComplyEaze, Axal, Pack, and Tools |
| `color.ink-inverse` | `--sk-color-ink-inverse` | `alias of color.surface-raised; resolves to oklch(100% 0 0)` | Primary inverse text and icons. | Do not use on light surfaces. | — | C1 foundation.css shared across ComplyEaze, Axal, Pack, and Tools |
| `color.border-subtle` | `--sk-color-border-subtle` | `oklch(82% 0.018 245)` | Separating related rows and sections. | Do not rely on it as the only control boundary. | — | C1 foundation.css shared across ComplyEaze, Axal, Pack, and Tools |
| `color.border-default` | `--sk-color-border-default` | `oklch(64% 0.018 255)` | Controls and surfaces requiring visible separation. | Do not use decorative borders on every container. | --sk-color-border-control: Deprecated control-specific name; use border-default. | v0.0.2 public token compatibility and current primitive consumption |
| `color.border-strong` | `--sk-color-border-strong` | `oklch(57% 0.03 245)` | Selected evidence planes and high-priority separation. | Do not substitute it for status text. | — | C1 foundation.css shared across ComplyEaze, Axal, Pack, and Tools |
| `color.brand-primary` | `--sk-color-brand-primary` | `oklch(16% 0.028 235)` | Primary actions and dark evidence planes. | Do not use as an inactive-state fill. | — | C1 foundation.css shared across ComplyEaze, Axal, Pack, and Tools |
| `color.brand-secondary` | `--sk-color-brand-secondary` | `oklch(73% 0.09 162)` | Source-linked, ready, and locally verified accents. | Do not imply statutory approval or completion. | — | C1 foundation.css shared across ComplyEaze, Axal, Pack, and Tools |
| `color.accent-seal` | `--sk-color-accent-seal` | `oklch(76% 0.14 82)` | Sparse source, review, and attention markers. | Do not use as a universal decorative highlight. | --sk-color-accent: Deprecated flat accent; use accent-seal. | C1 foundation.css shared across ComplyEaze, Axal, Pack, and Tools |

## Typography

Runtime-safe display, body, mono, scale, weight, rhythm, and tracking roles.

| Semantic token | CSS variable | Example / resolved value | Use | Do not use | Legacy alias / deprecation | C1 or compatibility source |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `font.display` | `--sk-font-display` | `Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif` | Public headings and proof-object titles. | Do not use display styling for dense controls or tables. | — | C1 foundation.css shared across ComplyEaze, Axal, Pack, and Tools |
| `font.body` | `--sk-font-body` | `alias of font.display; resolves to Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif` | Body copy, controls, labels, and operational UI. | Do not add a remote font dependency in package CSS. | — | C1 foundation.css shared across ComplyEaze, Axal, Pack, and Tools |
| `font.mono` | `--sk-font-mono` | `"SFMono-Regular", Consolas, "Liberation Mono", monospace` | Amounts, IDs, GSTINs, dates, checksums, releases, and source references. | Do not use for paragraphs or decorative code styling. | — | C1 foundation.css shared across ComplyEaze, Axal, Pack, and Tools |
| `font-size.xs` | `--sk-font-size-xs` | `0.72rem` | Source labels, compact metadata, and captions. | Do not use for long body copy or primary actions. | — | C1 foundation.css shared across ComplyEaze, Axal, Pack, and Tools |
| `font-size.sm` | `--sk-font-size-sm` | `0.875rem` | Hints, badges, and secondary labels. | Do not use when dense content becomes unreadable. | — | v0.0.2 public token compatibility and current primitive consumption |
| `font-size.md` | `--sk-font-size-md` | `0.9375rem` | Controls, labels, and compact body content. | Do not use as the only hierarchy signal. | — | v0.0.2 public token compatibility and current primitive consumption |
| `font-size.lg` | `--sk-font-size-lg` | `1rem` | Body copy and comfortable control text. | Do not inflate dense tables. | — | C1 foundation.css shared across ComplyEaze, Axal, Pack, and Tools |
| `font-size.xl` | `--sk-font-size-xl` | `1.25rem` | Card and panel headings. | Do not use for micro labels. | — | C1 foundation.css shared across ComplyEaze, Axal, Pack, and Tools |
| `font-size.2xl` | `--sk-font-size-2xl` | `1.55rem` | Selected records and compact section titles. | Do not use for dense row labels. | — | C1 Axal and Pack headings |
| `font-size.3xl` | `--sk-font-size-3xl` | `clamp(1.55rem, 2.8vw, 2.65rem)` | Public proof-section and directory headings. | Do not use inside compact product controls. | — | C1 foundation.css shared across ComplyEaze, Axal, Pack, and Tools |
| `font-size.4xl` | `--sk-font-size-4xl` | `clamp(2.3rem, 5.2vw, 5rem)` | North Star compact page headlines. | Do not use in tables or side panels. | — | C1 foundation.css shared across ComplyEaze, Axal, Pack, and Tools |
| `font-size.5xl` | `--sk-font-size-5xl` | `clamp(3.15rem, 7.1vw, 6rem)` | A single dominant public headline when composition supports it. | Do not use by default or in product workspace UI. | — | C1 ComplyEaze hero proves a real 5xl need |
| `font-weight.regular` | `--sk-font-weight-regular` | `400` | Body copy and long-form reading. | Do not lower contrast by combining with muted colors carelessly. | — | C1 foundation.css shared across ComplyEaze, Axal, Pack, and Tools |
| `font-weight.medium` | `--sk-font-weight-medium` | `500` | Secondary emphasis and data labels. | Do not replace structural hierarchy with weight alone. | — | C1 foundation.css shared across ComplyEaze, Axal, Pack, and Tools |
| `font-weight.semibold` | `--sk-font-weight-semibold` | `650` | Controls, labels, and important state text. | Do not apply to every sentence. | — | v0.0.2 public token compatibility and current primitive consumption |
| `font-weight.bold` | `--sk-font-weight-bold` | `700` | Badges, headings, and critical facts. | Do not use as a substitute for spacing and hierarchy. | — | v0.0.2 public token compatibility and current primitive consumption |
| `line-height.ui` | `--sk-line-height-ui` | `1.2` | Controls and short labels. | Do not use for paragraphs. | --sk-line-height-control: Deprecated control role; use line-height-ui.; --sk-line-height-label: Deprecated label role; use line-height-ui. | v0.0.2 public token compatibility and current primitive consumption |
| `line-height.body` | `--sk-line-height-body` | `1.5` | Body copy and supporting descriptions. | Do not compress long-form text below this without evidence. | — | v0.0.2 public token compatibility and current primitive consumption |
| `line-height.display` | `--sk-line-height-display` | `0.95` | Large public headings only. | Do not use for controls, tables, or body copy. | — | C1 foundation.css shared across ComplyEaze, Axal, Pack, and Tools |
| `line-height.caption` | `--sk-line-height-caption` | `1.25` | Metadata, source notes, and badges. | Do not use for multi-paragraph copy. | --sk-line-height-tight: Deprecated tight role; use line-height-caption. | C1 foundation.css shared across ComplyEaze, Axal, Pack, and Tools |
| `letter-spacing.tight` | `--sk-letter-spacing-tight` | `-0.04em` | Large display headings with reviewed copy. | Do not track more tightly than this role. | — | C1 foundation.css shared across ComplyEaze, Axal, Pack, and Tools |
| `letter-spacing.normal` | `--sk-letter-spacing-normal` | `0` | Body, controls, and data. | Do not add decorative tracking to ordinary labels. | — | v0.0.2 public token compatibility and current primitive consumption |
| `letter-spacing.caps` | `--sk-letter-spacing-caps` | `0.06em` | File tabs, provenance labels, and source metadata. | Do not create an eyebrow above every section. | — | C1 foundation.css shared across ComplyEaze, Axal, Pack, and Tools |

| `section-padding.md` | `--sk-section-padding-md` | `clamp(2.75rem, 6vw, 5.5rem)` | Compact North Star intros and proof sections. | Do not use inside dense rows. | — | C1 foundation.css shared across ComplyEaze, Axal, Pack, and Tools |

## Borders, radius, elevation, and focus

Border-led hierarchy with restrained radii, quiet elevation, and focus geometry.

| Semantic token | CSS variable | Example / resolved value | Use | Do not use | Legacy alias / deprecation | C1 or compatibility source |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `border-width.hairline` | `--sk-border-width-hairline` | `1px` | Quiet dividers and ledger rails. | Do not use where non-text contrast requires a stronger boundary. | — | C1 foundation.css shared across ComplyEaze, Axal, Pack, and Tools |
| `border-width.default` | `--sk-border-width-default` | `alias of border-width.hairline; resolves to 1px` | Control and surface boundaries. | Do not stack multiple borders decoratively. | — | C1 foundation.css shared across ComplyEaze, Axal, Pack, and Tools |
| `border-width.strong` | `--sk-border-width-strong` | `0.16rem` | Selected evidence planes and high-priority states. | Do not use as a decorative side stripe. | — | C1 selected queue and evidence borders |
| `radius.sm` | `--sk-radius-sm` | `0.5rem` | Buttons, fields, and compact badges. | Do not use pill shapes without a primitive need. | --sk-radius-control: Deprecated control radius; use radius-sm. | v0.0.2 public token compatibility and current primitive consumption |
| `radius.md` | `--sk-radius-md` | `0.625rem` | Cards and compact evidence records. | Do not round large page sections excessively. | --sk-radius-card: Deprecated card radius; use radius-md. | v0.0.2 public token compatibility and current primitive consumption |
| `radius.lg` | `--sk-radius-lg` | `1.1rem` | Dominant North Star proof artifacts only. | Do not use on nested records or controls. | — | C1 foundation.css shared across ComplyEaze, Axal, Pack, and Tools |
| `shadow.card` | `--sk-shadow-card` | `0 1px 2px color-mix(in oklch, var(--sk-color-ink-muted) 14%, transparent)` | Only when a static surface genuinely lifts above canvas. | Do not pair with a decorative wide shadow. | --sk-elevation-card: Deprecated elevation name; use shadow-card. | v0.0.2 public token compatibility and current primitive consumption |
| `shadow.raised` | `--sk-shadow-raised` | `alias of shadow.card; resolves to 0 1px 2px color-mix(in oklch, var(--sk-color-ink-muted) 14%, transparent)` | Raised content when border hierarchy is insufficient. | Do not use to decorate ordinary sections. | — | v0.0.2 public token compatibility and current primitive consumption |
| `shadow.popover` | `--sk-shadow-popover` | `alias of shadow.card; resolves to 0 1px 2px color-mix(in oklch, var(--sk-color-ink-muted) 14%, transparent)` | Future popovers and disclosures with a real stacking need. | Do not invent a glow or broad floating shadow. | — | C1 quiet-elevation rule; stronger value deferred |
| `shadow.focus` | `--sk-shadow-focus` | `0 0 0 var(--sk-focus-outline-width) var(--sk-color-focus)` | Mechanically equivalent visible focus fallback. | Do not replace native forced-color outlines. | — | C1 focus evidence and v0.0.2 focus geometry |
| `focus.outline-width` | `--sk-focus-outline-width` | `2px` | Keyboard focus rings. | Do not reduce below visible non-text contrast needs. | — | v0.0.2 public token compatibility and current primitive consumption |
| `focus.outline-offset` | `--sk-focus-outline-offset` | `2px` | Separating focus evidence from control edges. | Do not clip the outline inside overflow containers. | — | v0.0.2 public token compatibility and current primitive consumption |

## Motion

Short, CSS-first durations, easing curves, and travel distances for state feedback.

| Semantic token | CSS variable | Example / resolved value | Use | Do not use | Legacy alias / deprecation | C1 or compatibility source |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `motion.duration-instant` | `--sk-motion-duration-instant` | `80ms` | Pressed and focus feedback that must feel direct. | Do not animate content entry with this role. | — | Master section 6.8 instant range |
| `motion.duration-fast` | `--sk-motion-duration-fast` | `140ms` | Focus, hover, and disclosure indicators. | Do not use for looping progress. | — | C1 motion study plus repeated focus and disclosure evidence |
| `motion.duration-standard` | `--sk-motion-duration-standard` | `180ms` | Ordinary control and status transitions. | Do not delay access to content. | — | v0.0.2 public token compatibility and current primitive consumption |
| `motion.duration-slow` | `--sk-motion-duration-slow` | `240ms` | Rare emphasized state transitions. | Do not promote the C1-only 640ms progress or assist study. | — | Master section 6.8 slow range; C1 640ms candidate explicitly deferred |
| `motion.ease-standard` | `--sk-motion-easing-standard` | `ease-out` | Routine UI transitions. | Do not use spring or bounce motion. | — | v0.0.2 public token compatibility and current primitive consumption |
| `motion.ease-enter` | `--sk-motion-easing-enter` | `cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1)` | Short state and disclosure entry. | Do not gate content visibility on animation. | — | C1 motion study plus repeated focus and disclosure evidence |
| `motion.ease-exit` | `--sk-motion-easing-exit` | `alias of motion.ease-enter; resolves to cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1)` | Short state exits where content remains accessible. | Do not animate layout properties. | — | C1 motion study plus repeated focus and disclosure evidence |
| `motion.ease-emphasized` | `--sk-motion-easing-emphasized` | `alias of motion.ease-enter; resolves to cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.8, 0.2, 1)` | Rare high-salience state feedback. | Do not use as a global reveal system. | — | C1 motion study plus repeated focus and disclosure evidence |
| `motion.distance-xs` | `--sk-motion-distance-xs` | `alias of space.1; resolves to 0.25rem` | Press and focus feedback where travel is necessary. | Do not move critical content to communicate completion. | — | Master section 6.8 distance range |
| `motion.distance-md` | `--sk-motion-distance-md` | `alias of space.4; resolves to 1rem` | Rare emphasized state continuity. | Do not use for parallax or page choreography. | — | Master section 6.8 distance range |

## One-release compatibility

Deprecated v0.0.2 values retained only where no equivalent semantic alias preserves behavior.

| Semantic token | CSS variable | Example / resolved value | Use | Do not use | Legacy alias / deprecation | C1 or compatibility source |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `compat.duration-loading` | `--sk-motion-duration-loading` | `720ms` | Existing loading indicators during the one-release compatibility window. | Do not use for new motion; S6 will define loading behavior. | Deprecated; replacement motion.duration-slow | v0.0.2 public token compatibility and current primitive consumption |
| `compat.easing-linear` | `--sk-motion-easing-linear` | `linear` | Existing loading indicators during the one-release compatibility window. | Do not use for new transitions. | Deprecated; replacement motion.ease-standard | v0.0.2 public token compatibility and current primitive consumption |
| `compat.badge-min` | `--sk-size-badge-min` | `1.5rem` | Existing Badge primitive compatibility. | Do not use for new control sizing. | Deprecated; replacement control-height.sm | v0.0.2 public token compatibility and current primitive consumption |

## Forced colors

Do not disable system colors blindly. Preserve visible borders and focus, allow status text to remain the semantic signal, and use native forced-color behavior where it is stronger than authored colors. Package tokens do not substitute for consumer-level forced-colors testing.

## C1 extraction decision

The source references in the tables point back to the approved C1 foundations, motion decisions, or the v0.0.2 compatibility contract. Product-specific canvases, one-off headline breaks, textures, breakpoints, and pattern composition remain local or deferred to S4–S7.
